text: I feel exposed and a bit disoriented in this sleek, modern space. The reflections on the glass create an uncertain boundary between interior and exterior, as if my presence is both visible and veiled. Stepping closer to the vibrant wall, I sense the weight of inquiry in this R+D exhibit. The words on the screen echo my own internal state: a longing for understanding, a chasm between intention and perception. I become acutely aware of my awkwardness, magnified under the fluorescent lights, and wonder what it means to be seen, interpreted, or misunderstood in places designed for contemplation and innovation.
